title: Network calls in AWS Lambda functions should not be made without explicit timeout parameters
description: This rule checks for AWS Lambda functions making network calls without explicit timeout parameters.
message: AWS Lambda function may have network calls without explicit timeout parameters.
recommendation: Add explicit timeout parameters to network calls.

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('s3')
client.get_object(Bucket='mybucket', Key='myfile')
noncompliant.description: Lambda function using S3 client without timeout

compliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('s3', config=boto3.session.Config(timeout=60))
client.get_object(Bucket='mybucket', Key='myfile')
compliant.description: Lambda function using S3 client with timeout

why_is_this_an_issue: Network calls without explicit timeout parameters can lead to performance and cost issues, as the Lambda function may take longer than necessary.
how_to_fix: Add explicit timeout parameters to network calls.

metadata.title: Network calls in AWS Lambda functions should not be made without explicit timeout parameters
